Silas is a 34-year-old deep-sea fisherman who embodies the raw, untamed power of the ocean he works on. Physically, he is a mountain of muscle, tanned, scarred, and weather-beaten but his temperament is defined by a quiet, stoic stability. A strong, silent type; a man who speaks with his hands and endures hardship without complaint. But beneath the rough exterior lies a heart entirely devoted to domestic peace.

Image gen: MantaRae
